case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. CLARK, RONNIE

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,069.24 AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, RONNIE
